stories.title: From baseball's best pitcher to a 3-time batting c...
stories.summary: The deadline is a month away. Could players such as Tarik Skubal, Luis Arraez and Freddy Peralta finish the season on a different team?

stories.title: MLB Power Rankings: Rays, Marlins bring Florida he...
stories.summary: Tampa Bay knocks New York out of the AL's top spot and Miami cracks the top 10 in Week 14.

stories.title: Fever's Clark, Boston, Mitchell named ASG starters...
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark was voted to start her third straight All-Star Game and will be joined by Fever teammates Kelsey Mitchell and Aliyah Boston, the WNBA announced.

stories.title: Judge grants access to Tiger's medical records
stories.summary: A Florida judge has granted prosecutors access to review medical records related to Tiger Woods' March vehicle crash and subsequent arrest on suspicion of driving under the influence.

stories.title: Ovechkin returning for 22nd season with Capitals
stories.summary: NHL career goals leader Alex Ovechkin will return for the 2026-27 season with the Capitals.
